title: Student completes sign-in through the app callback
description: This test verifies that a successful Google sign-in callback establishes a session and returns the student to the authenticated app.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/callback/google
Verify the user is redirected into the authenticated app with a session established

title: Teacher signs in through the app callback
description: This test verifies that a successful Google sign-in callback establishes a session for a teacher account and returns the user to the authenticated app.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/callback/google
Verify the user is redirected into the authenticated app with a session established

title: Admin signs in through the app callback
description: This test verifies that a successful Google sign-in callback establishes a session for an admin account and returns the user to the authenticated app.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/callback/google
Verify the user is redirected into the authenticated app with a session established

title: User can log out of the app
description: This test verifies that signing out clears the current session and returns the user to the home screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the account menu
Log out of the app
Verify the user returns to the home screen and is no longer signed in

title: User transfers a signed-in session to another device
description: This test verifies that a valid handoff code transfers an authenticated session to the target device and lands the user in the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/handoff/[code] with a valid one-time code
Verify the user is redirected into the authenticated app with the transferred session established

title: Signed-in user can create a checkout session for a valid package
description: This test verifies that a valid package selection starts Stripe checkout and presents a checkout session link or redirect destination.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the package purchase area
Select a valid package
Start checkout
Verify a checkout session is created for the selected package

title: Student creates a booking
description: This test verifies that a signed-in student can create a new booking and see it reflected in their booking list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the booking creation area
Fill in the booking details with valid values
Submit the booking form
Verify the new booking appears in the booking list

title: Receive the daily video event successfully
description: This test verifies that a valid Daily webhook event is accepted and the webhook response indicates successful processing.

steps.description: Navigate to the Daily webhook receiver page
Submit a valid Daily event payload with a valid signature
Verify a processed confirmation is visible

title: Student views their bookings
description: This test verifies that a signed-in student can open their bookings and see existing sessions listed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the bookings page
Verify the user's bookings are displayed

title: View a session report as an authenticated user
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can retrieve an existing session report and see the report details.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Navigate to the session report view for an existing session
Verify the session report details are displayed

title: Teacher views assigned bookings
description: This test verifies that a signed-in teacher can open the bookings view and see the sessions assigned to them.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the bookings page
Verify assigned bookings are displayed

title: View the n8n workflow list as an admin
description: This test verifies that an authenticated admin can open the workflow management view and see the available n8n workflows.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Open the n8n workflow management page
Verify the workflow list is displayed
Verify available workflow entries are shown

title: Send a session report notification as a teacher or admin
description: This test verifies that an authorized teacher or admin can send a session report notification and see a successful confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Navigate to the session report view for an existing session
Send the session report notification
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the report notification action is reflected in the session report view

title: Enable or disable an n8n workflow as an admin
description: This test verifies that an authenticated admin can change a workflow's active state and see the updated state reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Open the n8n workflow management page
Select a workflow to update
Toggle the workflow active state
Verify the workflow state is updated
Verify the updated state is reflected in the workflow list

title: View the admin control tower snapshot
description: This test verifies that an authenticated admin can open the control tower and see the platform snapshot.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for an admin role
Submit the login form
Navigate to the admin control tower snapshot view
Verify the platform snapshot is displayed

title: Receive the n8n automation event successfully
description: This test verifies that a valid n8n webhook event is accepted and the webhook response indicates successful processing.

steps.description: Navigate to the n8n webhook receiver page
Submit a valid automation payload with a valid secret
Verify a processed confirmation is visible

title: Receive the Bunny encoding update successfully
description: This test verifies that a valid Bunny webhook event is accepted and the webhook response indicates successful processing.

steps.description: Navigate to the Bunny webhook receiver page
Submit a valid Bunny encoding status payload with a valid signature
Verify a processed confirmation is visible

title: Prevent a non-admin from accessing workflow management
description: This test verifies that a signed-in non-admin user cannot access the n8n workflow management area and sees an access restriction instead.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a standard user
Submit the login form
Open the n8n workflow management page
Verify an access restriction is shown
Verify workflow controls are not available

title: Compute retention scores while signed in
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can run the retention scoring view and see scoring stats for students.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Navigate to the retention scoring view
Run the retention scoring action
Verify scoring statistics are displayed

title: Run the session reconciliation maintenance task
description: This test verifies that an authenticated cron maintenance request for reconciliation succeeds and returns reconciliation stats.

steps.description: Navigate to the reconciliation cron task page
Run the reconciliation maintenance task with valid cron credentials
Verify reconciliation stats are displayed

title: Run the auto-complete session maintenance task
description: This test verifies that an authenticated cron maintenance request for auto-completing sessions succeeds and returns completion stats.

steps.description: Navigate to the auto-complete sessions cron task page
Run the auto-complete session maintenance task with valid cron credentials
Verify completion stats are displayed

title: Run the murajaah schedule computation task
description: This test verifies that an authenticated cron maintenance request for murajaah computation succeeds and returns compute stats.

steps.description: Navigate to the murajaah compute cron task page
Run the murajaah compute task with valid cron credentials
Verify compute stats are displayed

title: Block retention scoring for unauthenticated visitors
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated visitor cannot access the retention scoring view or run scoring.

steps.description: Navigate to the retention scoring view
Verify an authentication prompt or access-denied state is displayed

title: Invalid handoff code is rejected
description: This test verifies that an invalid or expired handoff code is rejected and does not create an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/handoff/[code] with an invalid or expired code
Verify an invalid or expired code error is shown
Verify no authenticated session is established

title: Reject a Daily event with an invalid signature
description: This test verifies that a Daily webhook event with an invalid signature is rejected and not processed.

steps.description: Navigate to the Daily webhook receiver page
Submit a Daily event payload with an invalid signature
Verify an invalid signature error is visible

title: Invalid package selection is rejected at checkout
description: This test verifies that attempting to start checkout with an invalid package is blocked and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the package purchase area
Select an invalid package value
Start checkout
Verify a package validation error is shown

title: Reject a Bunny event with an invalid signature
description: This test verifies that a Bunny webhook event with an invalid signature is rejected and not processed.

steps.description: Navigate to the Bunny webhook receiver page
Submit a Bunny encoding status payload with an invalid signature
Verify an invalid signature error is visible

title: Show a missing session report state
description: This test verifies that requesting a session report for a session without a report shows a not-found state.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Navigate to a session report view for a session without a report
Verify an empty or not-found state is displayed

title: Reject an n8n event with an invalid secret
description: This test verifies that an n8n automation event with an invalid secret is rejected and not processed.

steps.description: Navigate to the n8n webhook receiver page
Submit a automation payload with an invalid secret
Verify an invalid secret error is visible

title: Prevent unauthorized report sending
description: This test verifies that a user without teacher or admin permissions cannot send a session report notification.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for a student role
Submit the login form
Navigate to the session report view for an existing session
Attempt to send the session report notification
Verify an authorization error message is visible

title: Unauthenticated user cannot log out
description: This test verifies that signing out without an authenticated session is blocked or fails safely without changing the signed-out state.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/logout
Verify an unauthorized or signed-out response is shown

title: Prevent non-admin access to the control tower snapshot
description: This test verifies that a non-admin authenticated user cannot view the admin control tower snapshot.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for a teacher role
Submit the login form
Navigate to the admin control tower snapshot view
Verify an authorization error or access-denied state is displayed

title: Reject a cron task without valid secrets
description: This test verifies that a cron maintenance request without valid dual secrets is rejected and not processed.

steps.description: Navigate to the audit cleanup cron task page
Run the audit cleanup task without valid cron credentials
Verify a missing or invalid cron secret error is visible
